---
title: "HW4 Dashboard"
output:
  flexdashboard::flex_dashboard:
    orientation: rows
    vertical_layout: scroll
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)

library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(rio)
library(lubridate)
library(patchwork)
```

```{r}
mass_arrests <- read_excel("../data/Mass_Arrests.xlsx", sheet = 1)
safe_cities  <- import("../data/safeCities_ecoUI.xlsx")
covid_data   <- read_csv("../data/covid-19.csv")

mass_arrests2 <- mass_arrests %>%
  mutate(
    Race = as.factor(Race),
    Sex = as.factor(Sex),
    `Arrest Type` = as.factor(`Arrest Type`),
    Ethnicity = as.factor(Ethnicity)
  )

covid_data2 <- covid_data %>%
  mutate(date = mdy(date))

numcat_data <- mass_arrests2 %>%
  filter(!is.na(Age), !is.na(Race))

covid_us <- covid_data2 %>%
  filter(Entity == "United States") %>%
  drop_na(daily_cases_mean, daily_deaths_mean, date)

covid_us_pos <- covid_us %>%
  filter(daily_cases_mean > 0, daily_deaths_mean > 0)

catcat_data <- mass_arrests2 %>%
  filter(!is.na(Race), !is.na(Sex)) %>%
  count(Race, Sex)

race_labels <- c(
  "B" = "Black",
  "H" = "Hispanic",
  "I" = "Native Am.",
  "J" = "Asian",
  "O" = "Other",
  "U" = "Unknown",
  "W" = "White"
)

sex_labels <- c(
  "F" = "Female",
  "M" = "Male",
  "U" = "Unknown"
)

safe_avg <- safe_cities %>%
  select(-Overall_Score) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = -city,
    names_to = "variable",
    values_to = "value"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    type = if_else(str_detect(variable, "_In_"), "input", "output"),
    dimension = str_sub(variable, 1, 1)
  ) %>%
  group_by(city, type, dimension) %>%
  summarise(value = mean(value, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

safe_avg_in <- safe_avg %>%
  filter(type == "input") %>%
  mutate(
    dimension = factor(
      dimension,
      levels = c("D", "E", "H", "I", "P"),
      labels = c("DIGI", "ENVIR", "HEALTH", "INFRA", "PERS")
    )
  )

selected_cities <- c(
  "New York",
  "London",
  "Singapore",
  "Tokyo",
  "Paris",
  "Dubai"
)

safe_small <- safe_avg_in %>%
  filter(city %in% selected_cities) %>%
  mutate(
    dimension = factor(
      dimension,
      levels = c("DIGI", "ENVIR", "HEALTH", "INFRA", "PERS")
    )
  )
```

Row
-------------------------------------

### Cat-Cat

```{r}
ggplot(catcat_data, aes(x = Race, y = n, fill = Sex)) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge") +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = race_labels) +
  scale_fill_discrete(labels = sex_labels) +
  labs(
    title = "Arrests by Race and Sex",
    subtitle = "Massachusetts arrests data",
    x = "Race",
    y = "Count",
    fill = "Sex"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 13),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 11),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 11)
  )
```

Row
-------------------------------------

### Num-Num

```{r}
ggplot(covid_us_pos, aes(x = daily_cases_mean, y = daily_deaths_mean)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
  scale_x_log10() +
  scale_y_log10() +
  labs(
    title = "Daily COVID-19 cases and deaths",
    subtitle = "United States (positive values only, log scales)",
    x = "Daily cases mean (log10)",
    y = "Daily deaths mean (log10)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 13),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 11)
  )
```

Row
-------------------------------------

### Num-Cat

```{r}
ggplot(numcat_data, aes(x = reorder(Race, Age, FUN = median), y = Age)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = race_labels) +
  labs(
    title = "Age distribution by Race",
    subtitle = "Massachusetts arrests data",
    x = "Race",
    y = "Age"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 13),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 11)
  )
```


Row
-------------------------------------

Column
-------------------------------------

### Original

```{r}
ggplot(
  safe_small %>%
    mutate(
      dim_short = factor(
        dimension,
        levels = c("DIGI", "ENVIR", "HEALTH", "INFRA", "PERS"),
        labels = c("DG", "EN", "HL", "IN", "PR")
      )
    ),
  aes(x = dim_short, y = value, group = city, color = city)
) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_point(size = 2.2) +
  coord_polar() +
  facet_wrap(~city, ncol = 3) +
  labs(
    title = "Original multivariate view",
    subtitle = "Radar-style plot of average input dimensions",
    x = NULL,
    y = NULL
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 12),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 9),
    legend.position = "none"
  )

```

Column
-------------------------------------

### Improved

```{r}
ggplot(safe_small, aes(x = dimension, y = value)) +
  geom_segment(aes(xend = dimension, y = 0, yend = value), color = "gray70") +
  geom_point(size = 2.5) +
  facet_wrap(~city, ncol = 3) +
  labs(
    title = "Improved multivariate view",
    subtitle = "Dot plot of average input dimensions",
    x = "Dimension",
    y = "Average score"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 12),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold"),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 13),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 10, angle = 25, hjust = 1),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10)
  )

```
